description_long: This stereo sound system features a compact, rectangular body with a predominantly black casing and a silver front panel. The front face is equipped with two prominent circular speaker drivers and a smaller central sensor or camera, all set within a metallic-looking frame. The rear side includes two circular ports and a central rectangular connector panel, likely for power and audio input/output connections. The top, sides, and back are finished in a matte black material, giving the device a modern and understated appearance. The object appears solid and robust, with no visible buttons or control panels on the exterior. Its design suggests it is intended for stationary use, possibly as part of a home or urban entertainment setup.
description: A compact, rectangular stereo sound system with a black body and a silver front panel featuring two large speaker drivers and a central sensor. The rear includes ports and a connector panel, while the overall design is sleek and modern.
description_view_0: The front view shows two large circular speaker drivers and a small central sensor or camera on a silver panel.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid black surface with no visible features or controls.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals two circular ports and a central rectangular connector panel on a silver plate.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain black surface without any visible features.
